query:
SELECT id, gameDate, awayTeam, homeTeam, startTimeEst, awayBookSpread, homeBookSpread, bookTotal, sortOrder, ncaaContestId
FROM games
WHERE (awayTeam = 'youngstown_st' OR homeTeam = 'youngstown_st' OR awayTeam = 'robert_morris' OR homeTeam = 'robert_morris'
   OR awayTeam = 'uc_riverside' OR homeTeam = 'uc_riverside' OR awayTeam = 'hawaii' OR homeTeam = 'hawaii')
ORDER BY gameDate, sortOrder;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AW8r3RRauadYzS.root --database MW3FicTy7ae3qrm8dx8Lua --execute
